news.title: Stock Futures Drift Lower as Iran War Enters Fourth Month
news.summary: Stock futures were drifting lower on Sunday with no progress on the Iran war as it enters its fourth month on Monday.  President Donald Trump told Fox News in an interview that aired Saturday that the U.S. was “close to a very good deal,” but suggested a potential return to fighting as an alternative.  Brent crude futures edged higher, up 1.7% to around $92.54 a barrel, while WTI futures rose 1.8% to $88.90 a barrel.
